page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz, with 1.0 thread per core. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio. It lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core CPU and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 25%. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark database operations also rank in the top tier. Conversely, single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core CPU performance and gzip compression, fall in the middle 50% average range. Memory bandwidth and Redis SET operations also demonstrate average tier performance.

The instance offers high compute density with dedicated physical cores, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for parallel processing workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. However, the 2.0 GB RAM per core ratio represents a tradeoff for memory-intensive applications, and the absence of local storage requires network storage allocation. It is best suited for multi-threaded compute workloads, database operations, and small-model LLM inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with the KVM hypervisor, it provides 128.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and lacks local storage and GPUs. The instance delivers strong multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU scores ranking in the top 25%, alongside strong database operations and multi-threaded decompression. Single-core performance and memory bandwidth remain in the average tier. With a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, this instance is suited for parallel processing, database operations, and small-model machine learning inference. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and lack of local storage represent key tradeoffs for memory-heavy or local-storage-dependent workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database benchmark performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core compute-optimized platform delivering strong multi-threaded performance and high network throughput for parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B cores at 2.7 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with zero local storage
Strong multi-core CPU, database, and encryption benchmark performance
Suited for parallel processing, database operations, and small-model inference
